selectRole: Da fatan za a zaɓi rawar ku (USER ko ADMIN).

exploreDashboard.title: Bincika
exploreDashboard.description: Shiga cikin zurfin ilimin asirin Islama. Bincika tarin sirrika masu karfi, layu tabbatattu, kuma gano hikimar mutanen da.
exploreDashboard.shareError: Ba a goyan bayan raba a kan wannan burauzar.
exploreDashboard.shareErrorText: Ba a goyan bayan raba a kan wannan burauzar.
exploreDashboard.lexiconDesc: Gano ma'anar ɓoye ta haruffan Larabci (Ilm al-Huruf), lambobi masu tsarki da abubuwan alama na Alqur'ani.
exploreDashboard.quizDesc: Gwada iliminku akan kimiyyar asirai. Daga Sunayen Allah zuwa surorin kariya, tantance fahimtar ku.
exploreDashboard.calendarDesc: Canja kwanakin miladiyya zuwa kwanakin hijiriyya don gano kwanakin wata masu kyau don ayyukan ruhaniya.
exploreDashboard.downloadDesc: Sami damar shiga littattafai na asali a PDF, sautin addu'o'i, da fararen filaye don wafq dinku.
exploreDashboard.lunarFavorable: Lokaci mai kyau don Fath Wirds

toolsDashboard.title: Kayan Aiki na Sirri
toolsDashboard.description: Kayan aiki masu ƙarfi da kwarewa da aka tanada don masana ilimin sirri.
toolsDashboard.abjadDesc: Lissafa ƙimar lamba ta sirri na sunayenku da wuridai.
toolsDashboard.asmaDesc: Gano sunayen Allah masu dacewa da nauyin asirin sunanku.

journal.title: Littafin Ruhu
journal.subtitle: Tunani, wuridai, da ci gaba
journal.progressPlaceholder: Misali: An kammala karatun Khassiyya na Fatiha.

namesOfAllah.title: Sunayen Allah (Asma al-Husna)
namesOfAllah.subtitle: Cikakken Nazari & Abjad
namesOfAllah.occurrencesLimit: Ba a iya loda bayyanar ba ko sun wuce iyakar nuni.
namesOfAllah.initiationSecret: Sirrin farawa: Fitar da duk waɗannan ayoyin (Ayat) don karanta su tare yana zama "Khatm Al-Akbar" (Babban Hatimi) na wannan Sunan na Ubangiji, yana sakin gabaɗayan ƙarfin bayyanarsa.

abjad.title: Lissafin Abjad
abjad.description: Lissafa ƙimar lamba ta sirri na sunayenku da wuridai.
abjad.subtitle: Lissafin ƙimar lamba

asma.title: Sunayen Allah na Keɓaɓɓu (Asma)
asma.description: Gano sunayen Allah masu dacewa da nauyin asirin sunanku.
asma.subtitle: Zurfin binciken sirri na kiran sunayenka na Ubangiji
asma.intro: Shigar da Nauyin Lamba (Abjad) na cikakken sunanka. Wannan injin zai fitar da Sunayen Allah waɗanda ƙimar rawar jikinsu ta fi kusa da ainihin ku. Kowane siffa ana ba da cikakken bayani bisa ga ilimin asirai (Sirr al-Asrar) don bayyana keɓaɓɓen Zikiri naku.
asma.resultsDesc: Sunan farko da aka nuna shine wanda ya fi dacewa da tasirin ruhin ku. Danna kan kati don bayyana asirin.
asma.talsamDesc: Hanyar haɗin gwiwa na rawar jiki don ƙimar

99names.title: Sunayen Allah 99
99names.description: Bincika, yi karatu, kuma ku fahimci Sunaye Masu Girma (Asma al-Husna).

quran.title: Alqur'ani Mai Girma
quran.description: Karatun Alqur'ani da tunani akai, asalin duk wani Asiri.

tasbih.title: Tasbih Mai Wayo
tasbih.description: Mai ƙidayar zikiri mai fasaha don bin diddigin karatunku na yau da kullun.
tasbih.subtitle: Kiramga ta dijital tare da jin jiki

daily-dhikr.title: Mai Bin Diddigin Zikiri
daily-dhikr.description: Sanya maƙasudi kuma ku bi diddigin zikirinku na yau da kullun.

planetary.title: Awannin Taurari
planetary.description: Ƙayyade lokutan ruhaniya masu kyau don addu'o'in ku.

zakat.title: Lissafin Zakkah
zakat.description: Lissafa Zakkatul Maali daidai akan dukiya daban-daban.
zakat.subtitle: Lissafa Zakkah dinka bisa ga Nissab
zakat.debtsDesc: Bashi da za a biya nan take
zakat.notEligible: Ba a wajabta maka Zakkah a wannan shekara ba.
zakat.nissabInfo: Nissab da ake amfani da shi shi ne mafi ƙaranci tsakanin Zinare da Azurfa don amfanin matalauta (Galibi Azurfa).

faraid.title: Lissafin Faraid
faraid.description: Lissafa rabon gado bisa tsarin shari'ar Musulunci.

dreams.title: Littafin Mafarki
dreams.description: Bincika da rubuta mafarkin ku tare da fassarori.

personal-wird.title: Mai Samar da Wird
personal-wird.description: Istikhraj al-Asma: Lissafa Zikirin ku na asali dangane da nauyin ku na asiri.

lunar-mansions.title: Gidajen Wata
lunar-mansions.description: Manazil al-Qamar: Bi gidajen taurari 28 don ayyukan ku.

spiritual-compatibility.title: Dacewar Ruhaniya
spiritual-compatibility.description: Hisab al-Tawafuq: Dokar Al-Buni don aure da haɗin gwiwa.

ilm-jafar.title: Duban Jafar
ilm-jafar.description: Ilm al-Jafar: Babban duban asiri ta hanyar rarraba haruffa (Taksir).

elemental.title: Mai Binciken Halitta
elemental.description: Tabai' al-Huruf: Gano ainihin yanayin sunan ku (Wuta, Ƙasa, Iska, Ruwa).

geomancy.title: Duba na Larabawa
geomancy.description: Khatt ar-Raml: Samar da fassara siffofin duban ƙasa don neman shawara.

letters.title: Ilimin Haruffa
letters.description: Sirr al-Huruf: Gano asiran da ke tattare da kowane harafin Larabci.

rouhaniyya.title: Mai Fitar da Rouhaniyya
rouhaniyya.description: Fitar da ruhohin sama ko ƙasa bisa Sunaye da Nauyi.

taksir.title: Taksir (Rarrabawa)
taksir.description: Samar da siffofin Taksir da rarraba haruffa.

sirr.title: Sirr Al-Asrar
sirr.description: Cikakken binciken asiri: halittu, aura, da khuddam.

zairja.title: Duban Zairja
zairja.description: Na'urar Sufaye ta asali don faɗan da fayyace tambayoyin asiri.

khatim.title: Mai Samar da Khatim
khatim.description: Ƙirƙiri sihirin fili na 3x3 (Wafq) bisa ƙimar lamba.

ruqyah.title: Ruqyah ta Shari'ah
ruqyah.description: Zaman magani na ruhaniya mai zurfi tare da maimaita ayyana (7 zuwa 1000).

talsam.title: Mai Samar da Talsam
talsam.description: Ƙirƙiri kalmomin ƙarfi da talsam ɓoyayyu don adana addu'o'in ku.

istikhara.title: Istikhara ta Dijital
istikhara.description: Tsarin ruhi wanda ya ginu a kan Alqur'ani Mai Girma da ilimin Abjad.

khouddam.title: Mai Fitar da Khouddam
khouddam.description: Lissafa da kiran ruhohin mala'iku da na ƙasa (A'il da Yush) masu alaƙa da suna.

awfaq.title: Mai Samar da Awfaq
awfaq.description: Ƙirƙiri rikitattun sihirin fili (Muthallath, Murabba) tare da daidaita taurari da niyya.

quranic-faal.title: Istikhara ta Alqur'ani (Faal)
quranic-faal.description: Hanyar asiri ta tuntuɓar Alqur'ani don duban asiri da jagoranci (Zaɓin Ƙuri'a).

names99.title: Asma al-Husna (Sunaye 99)
names99.subtitle: Sunayen Allah 99 masu kyau da asirinsu
names99.searchPlaceholder: Bincika da suna, ma'ana ko Abjad (misali: 66)
names99.traditionalCountsDesc: Kowace lamba tana ɗauke da niyya da tsarin ruhi na musamman.
names99.talsamDesc: Hanyar haɗin gwiwa na rawar jiki don ƙimar

dailyDhikr.title: Binciken Zikirin Kullum
dailyDhikr.subtitle: Bibiyar zikirinku na yau da kullun da maƙasudin ruhin ku
dailyDhikr.noDhikr: Babu Zikiri da aka samu. Ƙara ɗaya don farawa.

protection.title: Kariya (Tahsin)
protection.description: Garkuwar ruhi, kariya daga mugun ido da maita.

fath.title: Buɗewa (Fath)
fath.description: Don warware yanayi masu wahala da nasarar aiki.

rizq.title: Arziƙi (Rizq)
rizq.description: Sirrin jan hankalin dukiya, sa'a da yalwa.

shifa.title: Waraka (Shifa)
shifa.description: Magunguna da addu'o'i don lafiyar jiki da ruhi.

mahabba.title: Ƙauna (Mahabba)
mahabba.description: Don fahimtar juna a iyali, aure da kuma samun farin jini ga halittu.

ilm_huruf.title: Ilimin Haruffa
ilm_huruf.description: Binciken Ilm al-Huruf da asirin haruffan Larabci.

questions.q1: Wace Sura ce ake yawan kira 'Zuciyar Alqur'ani'?
questions.e1: Annabi Muhammad (SAW) ya ce: 'Kowane abu yana da zuciya, kuma zuciyar Alqur'ani ita ce Suratul Yasin.'
questions.q2: A kimiyyar haruffa (Ilm al-Huruf), menene darajar lamba ta harafin 'Alif' (أ)?
questions.e2: A tsarin Abjad, Alif shine harafin farko kuma yana da darajar 1.
questions.q3: Wane Sunan Allah ake yawan ambatonsa don buɗewa (Fath) na yanayi masu wahala?
questions.e3: Al-Fattah yana nufin 'Mai Buɗewa', 'Mai Bayar Da Nasara'.
questions.q4: Ayat al-Kursi (Ayar Karaga) tana cikin wace Sura?
questions.e4: Ayar Karaga ita ce aya ta 255 a Suratul Baqarah.

lexique.title: Ƙamus Na Alamomi
lexique.subtitle: Ma'anar ɓoye da mahimman ra'ayoyi
lexique.noResult: Ba a sami sakamako ba don

calendar.title: Kalandar Hijira
calendar.subtitle: Mai Canja Miladiyya Zuwa Hijira
calendar.description: Wannan mai canja wata yana amfani da kalandar Musulunci ta Umm al-Qura. Yana ba ka damar gano kwanakin masu kyau (kamar tsakiyar watan wata) don ayyukan ka na ruhaniya.

onboarding.langSelect: Zabi yarenka kafin ka ci gaba.
onboarding.s1_desc: Abokin tafiyarku ta ruhaniya na dijital. Bincika asirin ɓoye, bi diddigin ayyukanku, kuma ɗaukaka ruhinku.
onboarding.s2_desc: Lissafa ƙimar Abjad, nemo lokutan taurari, kuma bayyana asirin haruffa da lambobi.
onboarding.s3_desc: Ci gaba da lura da Wirdinku na yau da kullun, mafarkai, da tunani na sirri a tsanake.
onboarding.s4_desc: Tafi tare da matakan wata da kalandodin ruhaniya don ayyuka mafi kyau.
onboarding.s5_desc: Shiga cikin ƙamus na asiri, gwada iliminku, kuma koya daga malamai Sufaye.
onboarding.s6_desc: Haɗa tare da wasu masu neman haske. Raba, koya, kuma ku haɓaka tare.
onboarding.s7_desc: Kasance da mu yanzu. Ƙofar asiri a buɗe take ga waɗanda ke nema da gaskiya.
